name: Pollution Control Facility Recapture Limitation

eligibility.description: Corporations disposing of section 1250 property that is part of a certified pollution control facility with a valid section 169 election.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides that the 20% ordinary income recapture rule for Section 1250 property does not apply to certified pollution control facilities where a Section 169 election was made.
